description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a spacious, open floor plan and a prominent central entryway. The exterior features a combination of white walls and natural wood accents, including columns and trim, giving it a modern yet warm appearance. Large windows are symmetrically distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house includes a two-car garage with wooden doors, visible on one side, and a set of steps leading up to the main double-door entrance. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms and a staircase suggesting a partial loft or split-level. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story house with white walls, wood accents, large windows, and a flat roof. Features include a central entryway, two-car garage, and open interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entry, steps, symmetrical windows, and wood-accented columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage with wooden doors, side windows, and the open layout of the living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, secondary entry points, and the overall rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the garage, driveway, and the connection between the garage and main living areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, flanked by wood columns and large windows, no porch or overhang.
